description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:16.04 Docker image and define four stages: pre-build, build, deploy, and test. In the build stage add a build-windows job that runs on Windows runners (tagged windows), executes `ci uild.bat`, and publishes the binaries `bin
im.exe`, `bin
imd.exe`, `compiler
im.exe`, and `koch.exe` as artifacts retained for one week. In the deploy stage add a deploy-windows job that also runs on Windows runners (tags windows and fast), runs `koch.exe winrelease`, and stores the generated `build\*.exe` and `build\*.zip` files as one‑week artifacts. In the test stage add a test-windows job that runs on Windows runners (tags windows and fast), sets the PATH to the repository’s `bin` directory, then runs `call ci\deps.bat`, compiles the test program with `nim c --taintMode:on tests	estament	ester`, and executes `tests	estament	ester.exe --pedantic all`. Use a before_script template for Windows to set the PATH (`set PATH=%CD% in;%PATH%`) and ensure all Windows jobs inherit it.
